examples: The prime minister of Fiji has said Fiji is in no hurry to rejoin the Commonwealth.
Britain has announced that it is to cancel about 200 million pounds' worth of debts owed to it by poorer Commonwealth countries.
Now that the country has embarked on a return to democracy, Commonwealth heads of government have agreed to end the estrangement.
Work should begin later this year with phase one complete before the 2014 Commonwealth Games.
Legislation in the 15 Commonwealth countries where the Queen is head of state would also need amending.
